name: dialog-demo
visual_summary: The DialogDemo component is a customizable modal window that can be used to display important information or prompt user input. It typically includes a heading, content area, and actions. A developer would use this component when they need to display a temporary overlay on the screen, such as confirmation messages or warning notifications.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready modal component with the following characteristics:

Name: dialog-demo
Description: The DialogDemo component is a customizable modal window that can be used to display important information or prompt user input. It typically includes a heading, content area, and actions. A developer would use this component when they need to display a temporary overlay on the screen, such as confirmation messages or warning notifications.
Style: e.g. flat, outlined
Interactions: e.g. dismissable, scrollable
Tags: modal, overlay, notification

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
